title: Search for the Nonnah

{{Quote|Rogue Squadron, this is General Rieekan. A Rebel ship called the ''Nonnah'' recently crashed somewhere in this vicinity. It was carrying a team of Rebel soldiers and stolen Imperial equipment. You must find them before the Imperials do.|General Carlist Rieekan's briefing|<ref name="RS" />}}
'''The Search for the ''Nonnah''''' was an operation in approximately [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. During a battle with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces over [[Chorax]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] named ''[[Nonnah]]'' was damaged and forced to crash-land on the surface of the planet. The ''Nonnah'', which carried stolen Imperial equipment and Rebel [[Troop/Legends|troops]], was considered vital by both the Alliance and the Empire. The ensuing search for the crashed ship took place in the river valleys of the planet.

The Alliance sent [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], led by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and an [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|evacuation shuttle]] to rescue the survivors; the Empire sent a squadron of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] along with a [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]] carrying a ground strike force to destroy the ship and prevent the stolen equipment from falling into the Rebellion's hands. Rogue Squadron stalled the bombing runs and ground forces long enough to allow the safe escape of the shuttle carrying the survivors.

==Prelude==
After the successful [[Rendezvous on Barkhesh]] around [[0 ABY/Legends|six months after]] the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forged ahead on worlds marginalized by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In one case<ref name="Official Guide">''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide]]'' places the first mission, [[Ambush at Mos Eisley]], six months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The [[Rendezvous on Barkhesh]] and subsequently the Search for the ''Nonnah'' follow that mission.</ref> around [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="Time" /> the Rebels pushed their luck too far, and [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] were called to clean up the mess.<ref name="Official Guide" /> The [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Nonnah]]'', which carried stolen Imperial equipment and Rebel [[Troop/Legends|troops]], had crash-landed in the river valleys on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Chorax]].<ref name="Instruction" /> The cargo on board the ship was extremely valuable to the Empire, but rather than attempting to retrieve the cargo, the Empire decided to attempt to destroy it to prevent it from falling into Rebel hands.<ref name="RS" />

Rogue Squadron, flying [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]] and led by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], went to Chorax to retrieve the equipment and troops before the Imperials could find them. Imperial forces set out to find the ''Nonnah'' at the same time as the Rebels. At the northern lake, numerous Imperial [[Viper probe droid/Legends|probe droids]] surrounded the area.<ref name="RS" />

==The battle==
{{Quote|Okay, Rogues, let's keep the crew out of danger until our shuttle can pick them up.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="RS" />}}
As Rogue Squadron flew down a canyon close to the ''Nonnah''{{'s}} position, six [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptors]] attacked straight-on. The Rogues [[Starfighter combat/Legends|engaged]] the TIEs, shooting down several of them. The Rebel pilots also engaged the probe droids. The opposing sides had three possible crash sites nearby to search. Soon after the opening dogfight, the ''Nonnah'' was located at one of the crash sites. The Rogues and Imperials traveled to the site of the wrecked starship, which was stern-down in the water. An Imperial [[Sentinel-class landing craft/Legends|''Sentinel''-class landing craft]] put down on land across from the ''Nonnah'' and disgorged an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] walker as well as three [[XR-85 tank droid]]s to attack the Rebels. The Rogues destroyed the Imperial forces as a Rebel [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] went to the surface to rescue the crew of the ''Nonnah''. Eight [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] reinforced the Imperial task force and began bombing runs on the ''Nonnah'' and the rescue shuttle. Skywalker launched his craft's [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]] to destroy the AT-ST and the tank droids.<ref name="RS" />

[[File:Nonnah_Chorax.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The crashed ''[[Nonnah]]'']]
In pairs, TIE bombers began their first attack run. As the second wave moved into attack position, the landing craft deployed three [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PTs]] to provide additional firepower for the bombers. Despite overwhelming odds, the Rogues shot down all the TIE bombers and held off the other Imperial forces long enough for the shuttle to complete the evacuation.<ref name="RS" />

As the shuttle left, another squadron of TIE interceptors pursued it. Rogue Squadron escorted the shuttle to the extraction point, and the survivors were rescued. Once the shuttle had escaped, General [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Rieekan]] ordered Skywalker to lead the Rogues away from the battle site. As Skywalker and the Rogues escorted the shuttle away, Skywalker executed a barrel roll.<ref name="RS" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|The shuttle is away! Rogue Leader, get your squadron out of there!|General Rieekan|<ref name="RS" />}}
Rogue Squadron successfully completed their mission, and the survivors and cargo of the ''Nonnah'' were extracted. Sometime after after the mission was completed, Rogue flight was once again called into duty when the Imperial general [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] requested an [[Battle of Corellia (1 ABY)|appointment]] with General Rieekan on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="RS" />

==Behind the scenes==
The search for the ship ''Nonnah'' is the subject of the third mission of the [[1998]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']], titled "The Search for the Nonnah." The player's default craft is the A-wing, equipped with lasers and missiles to target Imperial forces.<ref name="RS" /> The game's [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron: The Official Nintendo Player's Guide|official guide]] outlines the background information to the mission and suggests the player target the TIE interceptors to protect his [[Wingmate/Legends|wingman]], as well as accurately targeting lots of enemy units. The player will fail the mission if the evacuation shuttle is destroyed, or if the wreckage of the ''Nonnah'' is destroyed before the shuttle can finish evacuating it.<ref name="Official Guide" />
